degraded_reason: Parent implemented the selected bead directly and used two independent reviewer subagents plus targeted re-review subagents.
implementation_summary: Added public model call helpers with provider/model attribution, retry attempt, latency, token usage, summaries, terminal error/cancel handling, and correlation context propagation.
Added known-zero TokenUsage flags so explicit zero counts can be exported while unknown counts remain omitted.
Rejected missing provider/model inputs as dropped invalid_schema records instead of exporting normalized-invalid model_call spans.
review_blocker_summary: Initial reviews requested required provider/model enforcement so helpers could not export schema-invalid model_call spans.
Initial schema review requested known-zero token usage support and additional redaction coverage.
